ALCHEMIST-TIMELINE.title: Timeline
ALCHEMIST-ENABLE_EPOCHS.title: Enable Timeline Epochs
ALCHEMIST-ENABLE_EPOCHS.hover.desc: Adds the Alchemist's 7-chapter story to the Timeline, unlocking cards, relics, and potions as you progress. Disable to hide it from the Timeline and make all Alchemist content available immediately; re-enabling restores your progress.
ALCHEMIST-COMPATIBILITY.title: Compatibility
ALCHEMIST-KEEP_POOLS_SEPARATE.title: Keep card pools separate
ALCHEMIST-KEEP_POOLS_SEPARATE.hover.desc: Keeps Alchemist cards out of runs that don't include an Alchemist player, so they can't appear in other characters' cross-class rewards (e.g. Kaleidoscope). Disable to let Alchemist cards mix into any run.
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCKS.title: Unlocks
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCK_ALL.title: Unlock all Alchemist cards, relics, potions, and Epochs
ALCHEMIST-UNLOCK_ALL_BUTTON_LABEL.title: Unlock All
ALCHEMIST-RESET_UNLOCKS.title: Reset all Alchemist cards, relics, potions, and Epochs
